title: pterostylis × ingens
intro: Pterostylis × ingens, a hybrid orchid, is the result of a cross between Pterostylis parviflora and Pterostylis albiflora, two native Australian species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pterostylis × ingens are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots can be used to make infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which are applied topically to treat skin conditions and other health issues.
